body: Amara, following up on our earlier exchange about the [Halfway Capital](org/halfway-capital) deal flow you shared last month — I've had a chance to sit with a few of those climate infrastructure names and wanted to share some thoughts before your next partner meeting. The grid-edge storage play in particular caught my attention; I've seen a similar model work well at the Series A stage when the team has strong utility relationships, and from what you described, these founders seem to have that. I'd be happy to jump on a call this week if you want a second set of eyes before you move to term sheet. Let me know what works on your end.
